title: hpc-build-executor skill return envelope
description: Return envelope written by the hpc-build-executor sub-skill (covers both the executor scaffold AND the companion axes-init step) at <experiment_dir>/.hpc/_returns/hpc-build-executor.json. oneOf [Success, Error].

executor_path.description: Absolute path of the materialized executor file (build-executor primitive's data.path).

axes_path.description: Absolute path to the .hpc/axes.yaml the axes-init companion wrote. Null when axes-init was not invoked.

axes_wrote.description: Companion axes-init's wrote flag. True when axes-init authored a new file; false when an existing file was kept (without --force). Null when axes-init was not invoked.

homogeneous_axes.description: Homogeneous axes the companion recorded into axes.yaml. Null when axes-init was not invoked.
